query:
SELECT 
  season,
  JSON_KEYS(payload) as top_keys,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule')) as schedule_len,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[0]') as first_matchup
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2024 AND viewName = 'combined'
LIMIT 1;
